what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment ledger entry for the design-assets channel, registering an images-type link to image://design-assets/icons/Info_Gold with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter metadata with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
the file body after the frontmatter is empty
standouts: Points to a specific named icon asset 'Info_Gold'
Uses an image:// URI scheme for the target
Serves as a minimal, timestamped attachment record
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Follows the att-<hash>.md naming convention in channel-memory/channel_attachments
Uses an id prefix matching the filename
References channel assets via an image:// scheme
concerns: No alt text, dimensions, format, or author information is provided
The image:// URI cannot be resolved from the file alone
No usage context or lifecycle state is recorded
notes: A sparse ledger entry that links the design-assets channel to the Info_Gold icon image asset.
questions: What UI or component uses the Info_Gold icon?
How is the image://design-assets/icons/Info_Gold URI resolved to actual storage?
What does the 'Gold' qualifier signify for this info icon?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an images attachment matches the content: it records a target image URI and timestamp.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a discoverable, timestamped reference from a channel to a named image asset, supporting asset lookup and audit without embedding the binary file.
contribution: Provides a lightweight, discoverable pointer to a named icon image asset within a channel, enabling asset inventory, provenance tracking, and indirect referencing by other systems.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment file that registers an images-type link to the design-assets/icons/Info_Gold image asset with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make referenceable a specific icon image within the design-assets channel.
